caption: A man with a beard wearing a dark blue t-shirt is seated in front of a table, appearing in a small picture-in-picture window. In the main view, a person's hand is seen interacting with sports cards. A black foam storage case sits on a table featuring a colorful mat with a green palm tree design. The logo "JASPYS" and the website "CASEBREAKS.COM" are displayed as on-screen overlays. In the beginning, a hand is positioned over the black case, while a encased trading card sits in the foreground. As the sequence progresses, the hand moves across the top of the foam case and interacts with cards. The man in the inset window watches the process. The background includes stacks of graded cards, some of which have "STAR WARS" printed on their labels. The scene remains consistent in setting as the hand continues to manipulate the cards on the table.
